sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Ford Motor Co Stock: Navigating Electric Transition and Core Strengths in a Competitive Auto Landsca
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co is balancing its traditional strengths in trucks and SUVs with significant investments in electric vehicles (EVs) for long-term growth. The company's diversified business model, including Ford Blue (ICE vehicles), Ford Model e (EVs), and Ford Pro (commercial fleets), aims to leverage high-margin segments while funding EV expansion. Investors are watching Ford's profitability recovery, market share in key segments, and its ability to manage risks like EV adoption pace, supply chain disruptions, and competition.

feed.title: CPI Aerostructures (NYSE: CVU) leans on $504.5M backlog and key defense primes
feed.summary: CPI Aerostructures (CVU) released its annual report detailing a $504.5 million backlog, with 96% tied to government programs and major defense primes like Raytheon, Sikorsky, Lockheed Martin, and the U.S. Air Force accounting for significant portions of its 2025 revenue. The company specializes in aerostructures and aerosystems, serving both military and commercial aerospace markets, but highlights risks related to customer concentration, government contract dependence, and working capital management. Despite these challenges, CPI Aero focuses on converting its unfunded backlog and growing through established relationships and new build-to-print opportunities.

feed.title: Telomir Pharmaceuticals Submits IND to FDA for Telomir-1 (Telomir-Zn) in Advanced and Metastatic Triple-Negative Breast Cancer
feed.summary: Telomir Pharmaceuticals has submitted an Investigational New Drug (IND) application to the FDA for Telomir-1 (Telomir-Zn) to treat advanced and metastatic Triple-Negative Breast Cancer (TNBC). This first-in-class metal-modulating epigenetic therapy targets iron-dependent pathways and has shown preclinical efficacy and a favorable safety profile. The company plans to initiate a Phase 1/2 clinical trial following IND clearance to evaluate Telomir-1 as an oral monotherapy.

feed.title: BankUnited, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
feed.summary: BankUnited, Inc. (NYSE: BKU) will announce its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, before market opening. A conference call will be held on the same day at 9:00 AM ET to discuss these results, featuring Chairman, President, and CEO Rajinder P. Singh, CFO James G. Mackey, and COO Thomas M. Cornish. The company provides a full range of consumer and commercial banking products and services, with total assets of $35.0 billion as of December 31, 2025.

feed.title: NusaTrip (NASDAQ: NUTR) notifies SEC of late Form 10-K, cites audit finalization
feed.summary: NusaTrip Incorporated (NASDAQ: NUTR) has filed a Rule 12b-25 notification with the SEC, indicating that its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025, will be delayed. The company attributes the delay to the finalization of audit work and explicitly states it may not meet the 15-calendar-day extension typically provided by Rule 12b-25. NusaTrip will file the Form 10-K as soon as practicable.

feed.title: Tantech Holdings raises $2.15 million in direct offering By Investing.com
feed.summary: Tantech Holdings Ltd (NASDAQ:TANH) has completed a registered direct offering and concurrent private placement, raising approximately $2.15 million in gross proceeds. The offering included 7,166,671 common units priced at $0.30 each, with attached Series E and Series F common warrants. The company plans to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes and working capital.

feed.title: Phoenix Asia (PHOE) CEO reports 16.1M shares held via investment entity
feed.summary: Phoenix Asia Holdings Ltd's CEO, Yeung Chi Kin Kelvin, has filed an initial Form 3 reporting indirect ownership of 16.1 million Ordinary Shares through Phoenix Prosperity Investment Limited. The filing indicates no specific buy or sell transactions but establishes his beneficial ownership as a director, CEO, and ten percent owner of PHOE. This report serves as an initial disclosure of his holdings.

feed.title: BK Technologies opens Vision 2030 event to investors on April 2
feed.summary: BK Technologies (NYSE American: BKTI) is hosting a live Investor Day webcast on April 2, 2026, at 9:00 AM ET, covering its Vision 2030 objectives, LMR and public safety broadband outlook, and product roadmap. Registration for the event is open, and it will feature presentations from senior company leaders including CEO John Suzuki and CFO Scott Malmanger, concluding with a moderated Q&A session. The event details follow a series of recent company updates, including positive earnings and new product launches.

feed.title: Randal J. Kirk (PGEN) entities sell 4.8M shares, still hold over one-third stake
feed.summary: Entities controlled by Randal J. Kirk sold 4,772,781 shares of Precigen (PGEN) Common Stock for approximately $15.58 million on March 30, 2026. Despite these sales, Kirk and his affiliated entities, including R.J. Kirk Declaration of Trust and Third Security, LLC, collectively retain beneficial ownership of 133,956,416 shares, representing 35.9% of the company's outstanding Common Stock. The filing clarifies the adjusted ownership percentages and the calculation basis, including exercisable options and warrants.

feed.title: [8-K] Seritage Growth Properties Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Seritage Growth Properties (NYSE: SRG) filed an 8-K report detailing its Q4 and full-year 2025 operating results, which included $230.7 million in gross proceeds from asset sales and a debt reduction of $190.0 million. The company reported a net loss attributable to common shareholders of ($73.1) million for the full year 2025 and addressed litigation matters and its ongoing Plan of Sale amid challenging market conditions. Significant uncertainty remains regarding the company's ability to continue as a going concern due to the upcoming maturity of its term loan facility.

feed.title: CNS Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: CNSP) pivots to neurology and oncology amid going concern risk
feed.summary: CNS Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: CNSP) is undergoing a strategic pivot, shifting its focus from solely glioblastoma to building an in-licensed pipeline in neurology and oncology. This change follows the Phase 2 trial failure of its legacy asset Berubicin to demonstrate superiority over lomustine in overall survival. The company faces a going concern risk, with cash flow projections indicating it can fund operations only into the third quarter of 2026, necessitating additional capital.

feed.title: Goldenwise Capital takes 6.1% Phunware (PHUN) stake and plans governance talks
feed.summary: Goldenwise Capital Group Ltd has disclosed a 6.1% stake in Phunware, Inc., acquiring 1,233,811 shares for approximately $2.35 million. The investment is for "investment purposes," but Goldenwise plans to engage with Phunware's board and management on governance, capital allocation, strategic direction, and performance. They are seeking constructive dialogue and may pursue board representation or other shareholder actions to enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: Executive pay, buybacks and governance at Chatham Lodging (NYSE: CLDT)
feed.summary: Chatham Lodging Trust (CLDT) is holding its annual shareholder meeting on May 12, 2026, where shareholders will vote on the election of six trustees, the ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditor, and an advisory vote on executive compensation. The company highlights strong governance, including independent trustees, annual elections, a majority voting resignation policy, and share ownership guidelines. CLDT also reports significant financial achievements in 2025, such as a $70 million net debt reduction, substantial share repurchases, increased dividends, and active hotel portfolio recycling.

feed.title: Royalty Pharma (RPRX) director granted 815-share equity award
feed.summary: Royalty Pharma plc director Bonnie L. Bassler was granted 815 Class A Ordinary Shares as an equity award, replacing a $37,500 quarterly retainer payment. The shares were issued at a reference price of $45.977 per share under the company’s 2020 Independent Director Equity Incentive Plan. Following this transaction, Bassler directly holds 73,947 Class A Ordinary Shares.

feed.title: Regeneron (REGN) and Sanofi announce Dupixent approval in Japan to treat bullous pemphigoid
feed.summary: Regeneron (REGN) and Sanofi announced that Dupixent has received approval in Japan for the treatment of bullous pemphigoid. This marks the first approval of Dupixent for an autoimmune disease and the first and only approved drug in Japan for this specific rare and debilitating skin condition. The approval is based on positive data from a Phase 3 trial and real-world evidence.

feed.title: O’Reilly posts Q1 results April 29, then holds investor call
feed.summary: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) will release its First Quarter 2026 results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, after 3:30 p.m. Central Time, followed by a conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Central Time. Investors can access the earnings release and webcast via the company’s investor relations page, with a replay available until April 29, 2027. Historically, similar announcements have resulted in minor stock price movements for the company.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Cuts McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) Price Target to $64.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) to $64.00 from $67.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment aligns with a consensus target of $64.27 among analysts. Despite beating Q1 earnings estimates and strong revenue growth, MKC shares dropped 4.5% due to various concerns including potential shareholder dilution from a planned combination with Unilever's foods business, widespread analyst target cuts, and recent insider selling.

feed.title: SouthState Bank (NYSE:SSB) Given New $110.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for SouthState Bank (NYSE:SSB) from $120.00 to $110.00 while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of 17.54% from the stock's previous close. Despite this adjustment, analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with a consensus "Buy" rating and an average target price of $118.71 across several firms.

feed.title: Lowe’s (LOW) director Brian Rogers adds 105 phantom stock units in deferred pay
feed.summary: Lowe's director Brian C. Rogers was granted 105.807 phantom stock units, valued at $236.28 each, as part of the company's deferred compensation plan. These units are economically equivalent to Lowe's common stock and will be settled in cash after Rogers ceases to be a director. Following this transaction, Rogers now holds a total of 5,540.451 phantom stock units, which include credited dividends.

feed.title: Hu Yilin of Niu Technologies: 12-Year-Old Two-Wheeled Electric Vehicle Manufacturer Decides to Transform into AI, "All In or Nothing"
feed.summary: Niu Technologies, a 12-year-old two-wheeled electric vehicle manufacturer, is undergoing a significant transformation by fully embracing AI. The company's founder, Hu Yilin, emphasizes that this move is not about creating new AI categories but enhancing existing products like their newly released NXT2 and NX2 electric vehicles, which feature self-developed Niu Lingxi AIOS and an AI intelligent agent for riding. Niu Technologies leverages its decade of accumulated user data and established scenarios to develop AI-powered solutions for navigation, motor control, and battery management, aiming to improve user experience and efficiency.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust Named One of Fortune’s 100 Best Companies to Work For®
feed.summary: Camden Property Trust has been recognized for the 19th consecutive year, ranking 13th on Fortune’s 29th annual 100 Best Companies to Work For list. The recognition is based on confidential employee surveys and assessments of company efforts to create supportive work environments. Camden, an S&P 500 company, also ranked 1st in Best Workplaces in Texas and Real Estate in 2025.

feed.title: SIKORA debuts X-ray and laser tools to cut cable waste
feed.summary: SIKORA, a Dover unit, has unveiled three new measurement solutions for the wire and cable industry: the LASER PRO for diameters up to 110mm, the X-RAY 6000 family for continuous wall-thickness and eccentricity monitoring, and the LM PRO contact-free length system with ±0.05% accuracy. These innovations aim to improve quality control, reduce material usage, and enhance production efficiency for cable manufacturers. The new systems will be showcased at the wire 2026 trade fair in Düsseldorf from April 13-17.

feed.title: ONEOK posts Q1 results April 28, opens webcast the next morning
feed.summary: ONEOK (NYSE: OKE) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings after market close on April 28, 2026. A conference call and webcast will follow on April 29, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET (10:00 a.m. CT), with details provided for access. A recording of the event will be available on the company's website for one year.

feed.title: ONEOK Schedules First-Quarter 2026 Conference Call and Webcast
feed.summary: ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE) has announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings on April 28, 2026, after the market closes. A conference call and webcast for investors and media will follow on April 29, 2026, at 11 a.m. Eastern, where management will discuss the results. Details for joining the call or webcast are provided, along with information on accessing a recording.

feed.title: Stewart of Simon Property Group buys $36k in shares
feed.summary: Marta R. Stewart, a director at Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG), recently purchased 196 shares of company stock for $36,024, acquired through dividend reinvestment on restricted stock. This transaction highlights the company's consistent dividend payments and Stewart now directly owns 16,696 shares. The article also touches on recent leadership changes at Simon Property Group, including the passing of CEO David Simon and the appointment of Eli Simon as his successor.

feed.title: Michael Balmuth sells ROST shares on 03/23–03/24 (NASDAQ: ROST)
feed.summary: Michael Balmuth reported Rule 144-related transactions for ROST common stock, involving two open-market dispositions on March 23-24, 2026, totaling over 46,000 shares for nearly $10 million in gross proceeds. Additionally, 5,804 restricted shares are set to vest on March 31, 2026, under a registered plan. The filing, a Form 144, indicates a neutral impact and sentiment regarding these insider sales.

feed.title: Celia Edwards Karam (COF) sold 6,808 shares across three trades, broker listed (NYSE: COF)
feed.summary: Celia Edwards Karam sold a total of 6,808 shares of Capital One Financial (COF) across three separate transactions, as reported in a Form 144 SEC filing. The sales occurred on January 2, 2026, February 2, 2026, and March 2, 2026, generating aggregate proceeds of $1,276,885.40. The securities included Performance Shares and Employee Stock Purchase Plan shares, with Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC listed as the broker.

feed.title: Corning (NYSE: GLW) director granted 257 RSUs as equity retainer
feed.summary: Corning Inc. director Kevin J. Martin was granted 257 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of his annual equity compensation. These RSUs represent a contingent right to receive one Corning share each, with conversion deferred until a date chosen by Martin or his termination as a director. This transaction is considered routine director compensation and not an open-market purchase or sale.

feed.title: Sportsman’s Warehouse (NASDAQ: SPWH) outlines growth plans and key risks
feed.summary: Sportsman's Warehouse Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: SPWH) released its annual report (10-K), detailing its operations, growth strategies, and risk factors. The company operates 147 stores across 32 states with a strong omni-channel presence, where e-commerce accounted for over 20% of fiscal 2025 sales, and hunting and shooting sports represent its largest product category at 59.4% of net sales. Growth plans include enhancing loyalty programs, private labels, and digital marketing, while acknowledging significant challenges such as regulatory changes concerning firearms and ammunition, economic pressures affecting consumer spending, and potential store closures due to underperformance.

feed.title: Bridgewater Bancshares (BWB) director granted 280-share stock award in Form 4
feed.summary: Bridgewater Bancshares director Mary Jayne Crocker was granted 280 shares of Common Stock as an award, as disclosed in a Form 4 filing. The shares were acquired at $0.00 per share, increasing her direct holdings to 209,277 shares. This transaction is classified as a grant or award acquisition, with no insider stock sales reported.

feed.title: Nexxen Announces March 2026 Share Repurchase Program Summary
feed.summary: Nexxen International Ltd. announced that it repurchased 224,229 shares at an average price of $7.10 during March 2026, completing its $20 million repurchase program. The company now has 56,876,930 shares outstanding and will no longer issue monthly repurchase reports due to prior AIM listing requirements. Nexxen plans to implement a new share repurchase program of up to $40 million in accordance with applicable laws.

feed.title: Aspire Biopharma's Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Buzz Bomb Caffeine Company, Partners with Blue Shark Beverages to Expand Southern California Distribution
feed.summary: Aspire Biopharma's subsidiary, Buzz Bomb Caffeine Company, has partnered with Blue Shark Beverages for distribution and brand management in Southern California. This collaboration aims to expand the retail presence of BUZZ BOMB™, a 50mg sublingual caffeine stick pack, starting in the Coachella Valley and moving into Los Angeles and San Diego. The partnership focuses on capitalizing on the growing demand for "better-for-you" energy products and strategically increasing product placement in key markets.

feed.title: CoreWeave (CRWV) insider trusts convert and sell 22,915 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: CoreWeave's Chief Development Officer, Brannin McBee, indirectly sold 22,915 Class A shares through grantor retained annuity trusts (GRATs) after converting them from Class B shares at $0.00. The sales were executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on November 17, 2025, with prices ranging from $67.67 to $75.19 per share. Despite these sales, McBee-linked entities still hold substantial Class B positions convertible into Class A shares, indicating structured liquidity rather than a full exit.

feed.title: Bitcoin Depot (NASDAQ: BTM) sets rich pay packages for top execs
feed.summary: Bitcoin Depot (NASDAQ: BTM) has amended a previous report to detail the new compensation packages for its executive leadership. New CEO and Executive Chairman W. Alexander Holmes will receive a $1,000,000 base salary, significant bonuses, restricted stock units, and severance protections. CFO David Gray and General Counsel Christopher Ryan also receive substantial retention bonuses and restricted stock units.

feed.title: Latest BOF News - BranchOut Food Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter...
feed.summary: This page provides aggregated news and updates for BranchOut Foods (NASDAQ: BOF), a food technology company specializing in GentleDry™ dehydrated products. It highlights the company's financial performance, including record revenues and production milestones, alongside operational expansions such as the ramp-up of its Peru facility and new equipment purchases. The news also covers product innovations, partnerships, and capital markets activities relevant to investors tracking BOF stock.

feed.title: World Arthroscopy Devices - Market Analysis, Forecast, Size, Trends and Insights
feed.summary: The global arthroscopy devices market is expected to grow at a 6.2% CAGR from 2026 to 2035, driven by an aging population, rising sports injuries, and technological advancements. The market is shifting from capital equipment to consumables, with knee and shoulder arthroscopy being the largest segments. North America currently holds the largest market share, while Asia-Pacific is projected for the fastest growth.

feed.title: How Hospices Can Work with ‘Payviders’
feed.summary: Hospices need to understand and align with "payviders" – insurance companies that also own healthcare provider businesses – as this model grows. Companies like Humana, UnitedHealth Group, and SCAN Group are examples of payviders, which aim to reduce healthcare fragmentation and improve care coordination. Hospices should prepare for increased financial alignment and accountability for outcomes when partnering with these entities, emphasizing close coordination, especially with primary care physicians.

feed.title: We Energies proposes 4.7% rate increase for 2027, touts data center funding
feed.summary: We Energies is proposing a 4.7% rate increase for 2027, a smaller increase than what was requested two years prior. The article also mentions the company's efforts to secure funding for data center projects. This move comes as the company navigates various energy investments and studies into new nuclear reactors.

feed.title: Verisign to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
feed.summary: Verisign, Inc. (NASDAQ: VRSN) announced its live earnings teleconference for the first quarter of 2026 will be held on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EDT. The earnings news release will be distributed at approximately 4:05 p.m. EDT on the same day and will be accessible via their investor relations website. A listen-only webcast and audio archive will also be available.

feed.title: IBM Cloud: Enterprise Hybrid Cloud Leader Driving AI Innovation for North American Investors
feed.summary: IBM Cloud is positioned as a leader in enterprise hybrid cloud, integrating AI capabilities, particularly through its watsonx platform and Red Hat OpenShift. The article highlights IBM's strategic relevance in navigating multi-cloud complexity, its robust security and compliance features, and its appeal to North American investors due to resilient cloud revenue and a stable dividend yield. The company's roadmap includes multimodal AI expansions and sustainability efforts, further solidifying its market position.

feed.title: Bunge Global (NYSE: BG) grants performance stock units for Viterra integration
feed.summary: Bunge Global SA has approved a one-time performance-based incentive program for its senior officers, including the CEO, related to the integration of Viterra Limited. The program uses performance-based restricted stock units (PBRSUs) that will vest based on achieving cumulative run-rate cost synergy targets over a three-year period from January 1, 2026, to December 31, 2028. This initiative aims to incentivize and reward executives for a successful and accelerated integration and synergy capture.

feed.title: Synthego Welcomes Supreme Court Order Finalizing Invalidation of Agilent CRISPR Patents
feed.summary: Synthego announced that the U.S. Supreme Court has denied Agilent Technologies' petition, thereby finalizing the invalidation of two Agilent CRISPR-related patents. This decision concludes a multi-year legal challenge regarding widely used guide RNA (gRNA) modifications and removes a significant barrier to innovation in CRISPR-enabled research and therapeutics. Synthego's CEO, Craig Christianson, emphasized the company's commitment to fostering an open intellectual property landscape for the scientific community, especially as Synthego expands its leadership in cell and gene therapy with novel nucleases.

feed.title: CSPI (CSPI) CEO awarded 8,500 shares, now holds 216,360
feed.summary: CSP Inc.'s CEO and Secretary, Gary W. Levine, was awarded 8,500 shares of Common Stock, increasing his direct holdings to 216,360 shares. This transaction was a stock grant, not a purchase, and was reported in a Form 4 SEC filing. The shares were granted at a price of $0.00 per share.

feed.title: Just 64 Miles: Delta Air Lines' 10 New Ultra-Short Flights Revealed
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines has revealed its 10 shortest flights for April 2026, with the ultra-short Detroit to Lansing route (64 nautical miles) topping the list. While most of these short-haul flights are operated by regional jets, the Atlanta to Chattanooga route notably uses mainline Boeing 717 aircraft for a portion of its operations. These routes often serve as feeders to Delta's larger hubs, connecting smaller communities to its extensive network.

feed.title: Ammirato rejoins Brown & Brown as senior captive consultant
feed.summary: Allison Ammirato has rejoined Brown & Brown as a senior captive consultant after nearly two years at Luzern Risk. She previously spent six years at Beecher Carlson, which was acquired by Brown & Brown, holding various accounting positions. In her new role, Ammirato will be part of Brown & Brown's alternative risk and captives team, applying her expanded expertise in the captive insurance industry.

feed.title: Director Daniel C. Smith adds SPG (NYSE: SPG) shares through dividend reinvestment
feed.summary: Simon Property Group director Daniel C. Smith increased his direct holdings by acquiring 355 shares of common stock through dividend reinvestment on restricted stock. This transaction, valued at an indicated price of $183.80 per share, was not a discretionary open-market purchase but rather an automatic acquisition under the company's 2019 Stock Incentive Plan. Following this, Smith now directly owns 33,035 shares of SPG common stock.

feed.title: Peggy Roe adds 81 Simon Property (NYSE: SPG) shares via dividends
feed.summary: Peggy Roe, a director at Simon Property Group, acquired 81 shares of common stock on March 31, 2026, through the reinvestment of dividends from previously awarded restricted stock. This transaction, valued at $183.80 per share, increased her direct holdings to 6,885 shares. The shares were part of her non-cash compensation under the Simon Property Group, L.P. 2019 Stock Incentive Plan.

feed.title: [144] REALTY INCOME CORP SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article is an SEC filing (Form 144) for Realty Income Corp (O). The filing details a proposed sale of 3,275 shares of common stock by an individual, acquired through a stock award on May 18, 2021. The aggregate market value of the shares is $202,624.25, and the sale is expected to occur on April 1, 2026, on the NYSE.

feed.title: Hershey to resume using chocolate in most products, Reese’s grandson may taste sweet victory
feed.summary: The Hershey Company has announced it will return to using "classic milk and dark chocolate recipes" in most of its Reese's and Hershey's products by 2027. This decision follows public criticism from Brad Reese, grandson of the Reese's Peanut Butter Cups inventor, who went viral for calling out the company for using chocolate compound coatings instead of real chocolate in some new products. While Hershey's CEO stated the change was planned, Reese believes it's a response to consumer backlash.

feed.title: Director adds 232 Simon Property (NYSE: SPG) shares via dividends
feed.summary: Simon Property Group director Gary M. Rodkin acquired an additional 232 shares of common stock on March 31, 2026, through the reinvestment of dividends on restricted stock. These shares were obtained at $183.80 each as part of non-cash compensation under the company's 2019 Stock Incentive Plan. Following this transaction, Mr. Rodkin directly holds 19,687 shares of Simon Property Group common stock.
